string.text: The MTs-255 is a unique Russian revolver-style shotgun developed by TsKIB SOO in 1993. It features a 5-round swing-out cylinder, double-action trigger, and comes in various gauges including 12 and .410 bore. Designed for both civilian and law enforcement use, it includes models with tactical accessories like folding stocks and rails. Though innovative, its limited production was due to high manufacturing costs.\n\n
